events.label: Checkout error budget alert
events.summary: CloudWatch reported checkout error rate above the incident threshold.

events.label: API gateway throttling confirmed
events.summary: The public checkout API showed throttling during the first investigation pass.

events.label: Lambda concurrency capped
events.summary: Checkout orchestration Lambda was capped to protect downstream dependencies.

events.label: SQS backlog stabilized
events.summary: Order event queue backlog stopped growing after concurrency was capped.

events.label: RDS write latency inspected
events.summary: Database write latency remained elevated but below failover criteria.

events.label: Rollback decision approved
events.summary: Incident command approved rollback of the latest checkout adapter release.

events.label: Jenkins rollback job started
events.summary: The rollback pipeline began deploying the previous checkout adapter build.

events.label: S3 release bundle verified
events.summary: The rollback job verified the immutable release bundle before promotion.

events.label: EventBridge replay paused
events.summary: Replay was paused until checkout write latency returned to baseline.

events.label: Customer status update posted
events.summary: Support posted an updated customer-facing incident status note.

visual.goal: Show the checkout incident response as provider and role-specific timeline marks.

narrative_steps.title: Detect the failure
narrative_steps.summary: Start with the alert, API throttling, and Lambda mitigation.

narrative_steps.title: Rollback and recover
narrative_steps.summary: Follow the rollback decision, job execution, and customer update.

annotations.label: First signal
annotations.summary: The first mark establishes the incident entry point.

annotations.label: Decision point
annotations.summary: Rollback approval changes the response path.
